Best Time to Visit

  • Early morning (6:00 - 7:30 AM) typically has the shortest queues
  • Avoid peak hours (10:00 AM - 12:00 PM and 5:00 - 7:00 PM)
  • Weekdays are generally less crowded than weekends
  • Use the Prediction page to check crowd forecast before your visit
